assets/guard/
English, Simplified Chinese, and Japanese.
scripts/check_drift.py
scripts/scan.py
scripts/eval_run.py
The CLI entry point is bin/cli.js and the deterministic engines live in scripts/ (scan.py, canonicalize.py, check_drift.py, eval_run.py).
Parse installer manifests fail-closed, reject symlinked state, and replace valid state atomically.
No. HIGH security findings are ineligible for baselines and remain active.
MCP tools stay read-only, and findings are not operational failures.
A feature uses a minor version bump; a bugfix-only release uses a patch bump.
Installer smoke tests may write only to an isolated HOME, never the real user HOME.
Task-declared evidence binds automatically, explicit evidence composes with it, files are byte-hashed, directories bind type only, and freshness is verified before health.
Synchronize negotiated-version wire shapes, and never send modern-only fields to legacy MCP clients.

The baseline includes secret scanning, push protection, Dependabot security updates, required CI contexts, and conversation resolution. Admin bypass is only for sole-maintainer self-approval deadlock and never for red CI.
registry.npmjs.org
Same-scope differences are conflicts; ancestor-to-descendant differences are visible non-blocking overrides.
--max-bytes limits semantic text only; full-file SHA, line count, and security checks still cover the complete file with bounded memory.
A rerun may skip npm only when the published gitHead and packed tarball shasum match the exact release tag.
Use local scripts/dependencies, the nearest unambiguous manager/runtime, inherited canonical conventions, compatible root IDs, and repository-relative evidence.
External symlinks supply no fact, contained symlinks keep lexical evidence, and ambiguous package-manager/runtime facts cause abstention in root/scoped eval and Treat draft.
Required lint CI must use npm ci --ignore-scripts against the committed public package-lock.json, with no unlocked fallback.
Validate the complete task pack before any runner, judge, evidence hash, or write.
Failure opens or updates one exact-title issue; recovery comments and closes it, and unrelated issues stay untouched.
Report every reachable repository, but any unscanned entry fails with exit 8 after finding exits 2, 3, 4, and 7 take precedence.
Offline eval consumers validate stored result records, derive health from those records, and require every cached health field to agree.

PR validation proves bundled scan, bundled drift, and an exact npm override; release repeats both bundled commands before npm and verifies floating bundled code plus the exact new npm version post-publish.
Cursor/Copilot structured globs may narrow automatic conflict domains; conditional, manual, invalid, and ignored rules stay diagnostic, and recursive discovery never authorizes recursive deletion.
